title: Community Connects: Building Bonds in Tech

topics.title: Module Federation Updates
topics.summary: The release of Module Federation 2.8.0 introduces significant improvements, including a 54% reduction in size for the official Vite plugin. This enhancement is expected to benefit the entire ecosystem, making it more efficient and user-friendly for developers.

topics.title: Meetups and Community Engagement
topics.summary: Recent meetups for npmx in Boulogne-Billancourt and Vienna highlight the growing community engagement. These events provide opportunities for networking and collaboration among developers, fostering a sense of belonging and shared purpose within the npmx ecosystem.
